commitAfter: the correction-pass commit following da0cb85 (see git log)
referenceFilesReInspected: hyprmod/ui/options/color.py (gradient stop model: per-stop button + circular flat remove, add hidden at max, remove hidden at one stop, angle spinner, rebuild-raw emission)
hyprmod/ui/sidebar.py + hyprmod/style.css (category header class, navigation-sidebar lists)
hyprmod/pages/autostart.py (per-keyword source groups, locked rows with source metadata)
implementationNote: all code and user-facing text are original (standard GTK/libadwaita idioms); the reference informed layout and interaction structure only

issue1Tooltips.keptWithDocumentedReason: sidebar navigation names, setting-row accessibility text, and detail-pane identification (probe/driver targets), plus the review-card descriptors on Safety Details surfaces whose text the evidence harness asserts
issue1Tooltips.feedbackReplacement: inline-control feedback moved from tooltips to an error style class; picker guidance is visible text
issue1Tooltips.guard: tests/gui_correction.rs::normal_ui_builders_carry_no_tooltips (20 normal builders pinned tooltip-free; row builder pinned to exactly its one accessibility call)

issue2SectionHeadings.change: settings pages render per-section: a standalone heading label appended to the centered column, then a separate rounded boxed-list card of rows; the previous in-list header mechanism is gone; page titles show the page name only
issue2SectionHeadings.sectionNameCleanup: curated map + mechanical page-prefix strip (Decoration Blur -> Blur, Decoration Shadow -> Shadow, General Col -> Border Colors, General Snap -> Snap, Decoration -> Rounding and Opacity, Misc -> Miscellaneous, ...)

issue3ColorRows.change: color rows are stop-based: one checkered swatch button per color stop (clicking a stop opens its own validated picker with live preview, manual entry, Apply, Cancel), a circular remove button beside each stop when more than one exists, an add-stop button (duplicates the last stop, max 10), an angle stepper for gradients, and a back-arrow discard button that appears while the row differs from its original value and restores it through the same reversible preview path
issue3ColorRows.failClosed: unparseable current values fall back to a raw text editor with Apply gated on parseability; per-stop edits accept single colors only; raw token text is preserved exactly
issue3ColorRows.safety: everything routes through the existing reversible preview executor; Save stays the separate gated step; no new write/reload/runtime path

issue4BezierEditor.change: the Animations page opens with a 'Bezier Curve Editor / Create and manage animation curves' chevron row that opens an editor window (read-only multi-curve graph drawn from the session's control points + the proven curve picker controls), followed by an Animation Records card whose rows (the editable records, e.g. windows/layers/fade/workspaces when overridden) carry a menu button opening compact per-record controls: enabled toggle, speed, curve selector limited to existing curves, preview with recovery, gated Save; style preserved and not editable
issue4BezierEditor.configPage: the Settings (config) page no longer hosts any animation/curve controls - it keeps the config file row, Safe Live Save Mode, and the save note

issue5Sidebar.pages: General, Decoration, Animations, Cursor / Keybinds, Devices, Gestures / Monitors, Workspaces / Layouts, Window Rules, Layer Rules / Autostart, Env Variables / XWayland, Ecosystem, System, Permissions, Windows & Layout, Profiles, Settings, Safety Details
issue5Sidebar.renames: Appearance split into General + Decoration (prefix partition), Input split into Devices + Gestures, Displays -> Monitors, Keyboard -> Keybinds, Config -> Settings; XWayland and Env Variables capitalized as targets
issue5Sidebar.styling: uppercase caption category headers (dim label), larger nav row labels via an app CSS provider (1.08em), roomier row padding

issue6Organization.mechanism: ux_presentation::SIDEBAR_PAGE_LAYOUT PageSpec model: prefix pages claim official-setting prefixes, exactly one rest page per model tab catches everything unclaimed
issue6Organization.reachability: 341/341 scalar rows land on exactly one page (guard-tested with duplicate detection)

familyMapping.hl.windowrule: Window Rules page (source-grouped locked rows; preserved by the parser)

issue7Startup.autostart: sidebar page with a centered empty state explaining entries come from exec lines in hyprland.conf or sourced files; blocker: the read-only parser preserves structured families but not exec/env lines, so no entries are projected and none are invented
issue7Startup.noWritePath: guard-tested (no edit affordance, no gated call, no fs write in the shells)

issue8Pages.done: General/Decoration split with natural section names outside cards; Animations top row + record menus; Monitors/Devices/Gestures/Keybinds/Ecosystem read-only family entry cards; Window Rules real source-grouped locked list; Workspaces/Layer Rules honest empty states; Settings page slimmed; Safety Details unchanged as the proof home
deferred: Monitors live monitor cards with HDR/VRR badges (needs a safe read-only monitor projection; the UI never calls hyprctl directly)
Devices 'No touchpad detected' notice (same projection dependency)
Autostart/Env real entries (parser does not preserve exec/env lines; extending the parser is out of scope for a presentation sprint)
Layer Rules entries (layerrule lines not preserved by the parser)
live-linked bezier graph while editing control points (graph draws on window open)

harnessUpdates: probe pages renamed (Appearance->General, Display->Monitors, Input->Devices) in targets, specs, and matrix runs; Search probe already toggle-aware; DetailPane probe already row-first
validation: cargo fmt, cargo fmt --check, cargo check, cargo test (full suite, all ok), jq empty data/reports/*.json, git diff --check, cargo build --release, GTK evidence matrix - results in the final summary
